lines.speaker: Gauss
lines.text: I say, I say, a toast to this fine human!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have anything suitable to toast with.

lines.speaker: Gauss
lines.text: Then go get something from the bar!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I have this jug of wine...

lines.speaker: Gauss
lines.text: No no, get a pint of beer, jugs of wine aren't good to toast with! Wine stains are terribly hard to wash out of a beard.
